itinerary.title: Premium Mizoram Discovery Tour
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl • Reiek Mountain • Vantawng Falls • Tamdil Lake • Cultural Heritage
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM MIZORAM DISCOVERY TOUR — Aizawl • Reiek Mountain • Vantawng Falls • Tamdil Lake • Cultural Heritage. 05 Nights / 06 Days Captivating Mizoram Family Expedition.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the hidden hills, lush landscapes, and vibrant culture of Mizoram with this TRAGUIN curated family discovery. Designed for exploration and comfort, this Mizoram Discovery itinerary offers a serene escape into the heart of Northeast India's natural beauty. Experience the warm hospitality of Mizoram with TRAGUIN's handpicked stays, creating unforgettable memories.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-001 | Premium Mizoram Discovery Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Mizoram package (MZ-001 / TRG-MIZ-DIS-2026): Aizawl • Reiek Mountain • Vantawng Falls • Tamdil Lake • Cultural Heritage with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: TRAGUIN curated Premium Mizoram Discovery Tour with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl, the capital of Mizoram. Private transfer to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy the evening soaking in the breathtaking mountain views.
activities: Private airport transfer to handpicked Aizawl hotel.
Evening at leisure with panoramic mountain views.

days.title: AIZAWL CITY TOUR
days.description: Explore the cultural highlights of Aizawl. Visit local markets, heritage centres, and museums. Experience the local Mizo culture and iconic attractions.
activities: Sightseeing: Local markets, heritage centres, and museums.
Cultural immersion in Mizo traditions and iconic attractions.

days.title: REIEK MOUNTAIN & HERITAGE VILLAGE
days.description: Embark on an excursion to Reiek Mountain. Explore the heritage village, showcasing traditional Mizo homes and culture—a premium experience for the whole family.
activities: Excursion to Reiek Mountain and heritage village.
Traditional Mizo homes and cultural showcase.

days.title: VANTAWNG FALLS & NATURAL WONDERS
days.description: Visit the spectacular Vantawng Falls, the highest waterfall in Mizoram. This immersive experience is a must-see for all nature lovers.
activities: Visit to Vantawng Falls — highest waterfall in Mizoram.

days.title: TAMDIL LAKE LEISURE
days.description: Spend a day enjoying the scenic beauty of Tamdil Lake. Perfect for a peaceful day out, collecting unforgettable memories in the hills.
activities: Peaceful lakeside experience in the Mizoram hills.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Mizoram experience.

hotels.description: OPTION 04 – ULTRA LUXURY: The Grand Continental / Chawlhna Hotel | Bespoke Signature MAPAI Plan

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 5 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Guided sightseeing to Reiek Mountain, Vantawng Falls, and Tamdil Lake as per itinerary.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, drinks, and tips.
Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
